source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FREED:

Doctors are overworked, burnt out, and are quitting in masses.

At Freed, we combine clinician love with the latest AI tech and intense execution to create products that make clinicians happier.

Our first product is an AI scribe that automates medical documentation.

Since May of 2023, we have:

 - Acquired 26,000 paying and loving clinicians

 - Generated 100,000 patient notes daily and over 3 million monthly

 - Made thousands of clinicians happier https://love.getfreed.ai/b2xGQ1

With the backing of Sequoia Capital and other world-class VC’s, we are rapidly expanding our product offering. Patient-facing assistants, patient insights, EHR integrations, and other products are being built and used by thousands of clinicians every day.

We are looking for entrepreneurs. Fast, ambitious, and smart individuals who want to take care of the people who care for our health. Expect intense, clinician-focused, and interesting co-workers who want to win.

With an office in San Francisco, we embrace a hybrid schedule that brings out the best in teamwork and innovation. Our teams come together in person three days a week to collaborate, connect, and have a little fun along the way.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're on the hunt for talented, high-caliber individuals to join our elite team of engineers. As part of our team, you'll play a pivotal role in restoring joy to medicine while pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI technology. Our engineering culture emphasizes speed, end-to-end ownership, responsibility, and independence, attracting top-tier talent and promoting exceptional performance.




HOW YOU’LL HAVE IMPACT

 - Full Stack: Take ownership of product features and drive implementation across the backend (TypeScript) and frontend (React/TypeScript) components of our software stack.

 - AI First: Adapt the latest AI models (language and speech) and techniques to our use case. You can contribute to any of: model training, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and optimizing inference for latency and cost. Prior AI experience is not required.

 - Empowered Teams: Collaborate with team members in a fully remote work environment (work hours are flexible but most of the team is on the west coast). Our teams are autonomous and cross-functional, including Product Management and UX Design.

 - Data-driven: Design experiments to validate product changes and ensure the highest quality of our software.

 - Clinician Obsessed: Have a passion for our mission and dedication to making a positive impact on the healthcare industry.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - A history of consistent top performance and a desire for a mission-driven work culture.

 - 5+ years of experience in full stack Software Engineering.

 - Curiosity for LLM applications and familiarity with using AI for development (e.g. Copilot, ChatGPT, Cursor)

 - Familiarity with our tech stack is preferred, including React, TypeScript, NodeJS, Azure and SQL.




WHAT WE WILL BRING

 - Competitive salary and equity in a high-growth company

 - Opportunity to make an immediate impact

 - Medical, dental, and vision coverage

 - Unlimited paid time off

 - Company-sponsored annual retreats

 - Commuter stipend for our San Francisco based employees

 - 401(k) plan to support your long-term financial goals

source_jobs.title: Group Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FREED

Doctors are overworked, burnt out, and are quitting in masses.

At Freed, we combine clinician love with the latest AI tech and intense execution to create products that make clinicians happier.

Our first product is an AI scribe that automates medical documentation.

Since May of 2023, we have:

 - Acquired 26,000 paying and loving clinicians

 - Generated 70,000 patient notes daily and over 2 million monthly

 - Made thousands of clinicians happier https://love.getfreed.ai/b2xGQ1

With the backing of Sequoia Capital and other world-class VC’s, we are rapidly expanding our product offering. Patient-facing assistants, patient insights, EHR integrations, and other products are being built and used by thousands of clinicians every day.

We are looking for entrepreneurs. Fast, ambitious, and smart individuals who want to take care of the people who care for our health. Expect intense, clinician-focused, and interesting co-workers who want to win.

With an office in San Francisco, we embrace a hybrid schedule that brings out the best in teamwork and innovation. Our teams come together in person three days a week to collaborate, connect, and have a little fun along the way.

ABOUT THE ROLE

As Group Account Manager, you will be responsible for managing and expanding Freed’s growing base of B2B customers. Your portfolio will consist of medical groups of varying size and complexity that are currently subscribed to our core product. Some accounts will be at full capacity, most will not. Your job is to ensure we deliver on Freed’s promise: to be the most clinician friendly company in the world.

You’ll be responsible for every aspect of the customer journey: onboarding and training new users, troubleshooting any user issues, addressing technical questions about new or existing features, maintaining a ‘pulse’ on the customer and all key champions from the account (eg, clinical directors, chief medical officers, heads of innovation, etc.), and introducing new products when the time and fit are right.

HOW YOU’LL HAVE IMPACT

 - You lead the set-up and execution of a B2B customer management playbook, from onboarding to expansion.

 - You analyze and identify opportunities to proactively reach out to customers to make sure they are getting the most out of our product.

 - You identify and successfully close expansion opportunities.

 - You provide ongoing support to the user base across your portfolio.

WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 5-8 years of directly relevant experience managing high profile customer accounts.

 - An established ‘toolkit’ for delivering exceptional customer service, especially in a fast-paced, low process, entrepreneurial environment.

 - Core expertise in managing medium to large customer accounts, plus a demonstrated track record of expanding those accounts through deliberate, systematic efforts.

 - High motivation, self direction, and an intrinsic sense of ownership and accountability.

 - An indefatigable spirit that’s equally capable of handling customer delight and dissatisfaction.

NICE TO HAVES

 - Previous experience in an early-stage, high growth company.

 - Familiarity with advanced technology and AI-type products and solutions.

 - Previous experience working in a cross-functional, highly collaborative, asynchronous working environment.

WHAT WE WILL BRING

 - Competitive salary and equity in a high-growth company

 - Opportunity to make an immediate impact

 - Medical, and dental vision provided for US-based employees

 - Unlimited PTO

 - 401(k) plan to support your long-term financial goals

 - Commuter stipend for our San Francisco based employees

source_jobs.title: Head of New Business, Sales
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FREED

Doctors are overworked, burnt out, and are quitting in masses.

At Freed, we combine clinician love with the latest AI tech and intense execution to create products that make clinicians happier.

Our first product is an AI scribe that automates medical documentation.

Since May of 2023, we have:

 - Acquired 26,000 paying and loving clinicians

 - Generated 70,000 patient notes daily and over 2 million monthly

 - Made thousands of clinicians happier

With the backing of Sequoia Capital and other world-class VCs, we are rapidly expanding our product offering. Patient-facing assistants, patient insights, EHR integrations, and other products are being built and used by thousands of clinicians every day.

We are looking for entrepreneurs. Fast, ambitious, and smart individuals who want to take care of the people who care for our health. Expect intense, clinician-focused, and interesting co-workers who want to win.

With an office in San Francisco, we embrace a hybrid schedule that brings out the best in teamwork and innovation. Our teams come together in person three days a week to collaborate, connect, and have a little fun along the way.

ABOUT THE ROLE

As Sales Manager, you will lead and develop Freed's growing team of Account Executives while owning the execution of our B2B sales motion. You will be responsible for helping the team consistently achieve and exceed revenue targets through rigorous coaching, disciplined pipeline management, accurate forecasting, and hands-on support in strategic opportunities.

You will inherit a team of four Account Executives and play a critical role in scaling the organization as revenue grows. This is a highly operational and customer-facing leadership role. You'll spend time coaching reps, inspecting deals, refining process, participating in customer conversations, and helping close high-value opportunities.

The ideal candidate combines strong sales leadership fundamentals with a builder mentality. They know how to create accountability, improve rep performance, drive forecast accuracy, and navigate complex healthcare buying environments.

HOW YOU’LL HAVE IMPACT

 - Lead, coach, and develop a team of Account Executives to consistently achieve revenue targets.

 - Establish a high-performance culture centered on accountability, execution, continuous improvement, and customer outcomes.

 - Conduct regular pipeline reviews, deal inspections, and forecast reviews to improve conversion rates and forecasting accuracy.

 - Partner directly with Account Executives on strategic opportunities, executive relationships, and complex negotiations.

 - Improve win rates through structured coaching, call reviews, and opportunity management.

 - Analyze performance metrics and identify opportunities to increase productivity across the sales organization.

 - Recruit, interview, and onboard top sales talent as the team expands.

 - Design and refine compensation plans, performance standards, and operating rhythms that support growth.

 - Collaborate closely with Marketing, Product, Customer Success, and Leadership to improve the customer journey and accelerate growth.

 - Surface market feedback, competitive intelligence, and customer insights that influence company strategy.

 - Drive the successful launch and adoption of new products, creating scalable sales strategies and processes from the ground up.

 - Establish and continuously improve a high-performing sales operations infrastructure to enable efficiency, visibility, and scale across the sales organization.

WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 10+ years of experience in B2B SaaS/AI sales, including multiple years leading quota-carrying sales teams.

 - Previous experience in an early-stage or high-growth company.

 - Previous experience managing and scaling a high-volume SMB sales business.

 - Strong operational rigor, with the ability to build scalable processes, drive execution, and maintain a high bar for quality and accountability..

 - Demonst

source_jobs.title: Demand Generation
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FREED:

Doctors are overworked, burnt out, and are quitting in masses.

At Freed, we combine clinician love with the latest AI tech and intense execution to create products that make clinicians happier.

Our first product is an AI scribe that automates medical documentation.

Since May of 2023, we have:

 - Acquired 26,000 paying and loving clinicians

 - Generated 70,000 patient notes daily and over 2 million monthly

 - Made thousands of clinicians happier https://love.getfreed.ai/b2xGQ1

With the backing of Sequoia Capital and other world-class VC’s, we are rapidly expanding our product offering. Patient-facing assistants, patient insights, EHR integrations, and other products are being built and used by thousands of clinicians every day.

We are looking for entrepreneurs. Fast, ambitious, and smart individuals who want to take care of the people who care for our health. Expect intense, clinician-focused, and interesting co-workers who want to win.

With offices in both San Francisco and New York City, we embrace a hybrid schedule that brings out the best in teamwork and innovation. Our teams come together in person three days a week to collaborate, connect, and have fun along the way.

ABOUT THE ROLE:

We are seeking a founding Demand Generation leader to own the discovery and validation of new growth channels for Freed. This is not a role for someone who wants to run existing playbooks—it’s for a builder who thrives on experimentation, rapid iteration, and turning unknowns into scalable engines. You will be the person responsible for generating hypotheses, designing experiments, and working with internal teams and agency partners to execute, learn, and repeat—continuously uncovering where we should invest, double down, or divest. Your work will directly supplement and fuel the demand engines that are already driving Freed’s growth.

HOW YOU’LL HAVE IMPACT:

 - Own the end-to-end experimentation lifecycle: ideation, hypothesis formation, test design, execution, measurement, and reporting. Build and maintain a structured learning agenda that tracks what we’ve tested, what we’ve learned, and what’s next.

 - Identify and evaluate potential new demand generation channels (e.g., paid media, partnerships, community, events, content syndication, direct mail, product-led motions) that could unlock incremental growth beyond our current engines.

 - Design and run rapid experiments to validate or invalidate channel hypotheses before Freed commits more significant resources, budget and people. Move fast, fail fast, and document everything.

 - Collaborate closely with internal marketing, sales, product, and engineering teams to align experiments with broader go-to-market strategy and ensure learnings flow back to the organization.

 - Manage relationships with agency partners and external vendors, directing their efforts toward high-priority experiments and holding them accountable for results.

 - Build clear, actionable reporting that translates experiment results into investment recommendations—where to scale, where to iterate, and where to cut.

 - Develop frameworks and processes for continuous experimentation that can be repeated and scaled as the team grows.

 - Stay on top of emerging channels, tools, and tactics in the B2B and healthcare marketing landscape, bringing fresh ideas to the table consistently.

 - Leverage AI tools and automation to accelerate every stage of your work—from research and audience segmentation to creative generation, campaign analysis, and reporting. We're an AI company; we expect you to operate like one

WHAT YOU’LL BRING:

 - 10+ years of experience in demand generation, growth marketing, or performance marketing, with a strong track record of discovering and scaling new channels.

 - Demonstrated experience in AI-native work to design and running structured experimentation programs—not just executing campaigns, but building the testing frameworks behind them.

 - Startup experience, ideall

source_jobs.title: People Ops
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FREED

Doctors are overworked, burnt out, and are quitting in masses.

At Freed, we combine clinician love with the latest AI tech and intense execution to create products that make clinicians happier.

Our first product is an AI scribe that automates medical documentation.

Since May of 2023, we have:

 - Acquired 26,000 paying and loving clinicians

 - Generated 100,000 patient notes daily and over 3 million monthly

 - Made thousands of clinicians happier https://love.getfreed.ai/b2xGQ1

With the backing of Sequoia Capital and other world-class VC’s, we are rapidly expanding our product offering. Patient-facing assistants, patient insights, EHR integrations, and other products are being built and used by thousands of clinicians every day.

We are looking for entrepreneurs. Fast, ambitious, and smart individuals who want to take care of the people who care for our health. Expect intense, clinician-focused, and interesting co-workers who want to win.

With an office in San Francisco, we embrace a hybrid schedule that brings out the best in teamwork and innovation. Our teams come together in person three days a week to collaborate, connect, and have a little fun along the way.


ABOUT THE ROLE

The People Operations helps run and continuously improve the People engine at Freed. This is a high-execution, high-ownership role responsible for onboarding, offboarding, recruiting coordination, office management, People systems, and the day-to-day employee experience.

You will ensure every employee has a seamless experience from Day 1 onward, while building the operational backbone that allows the company to scale efficiently. We are looking for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and operates with urgency and ownership.


HOW YOU’LL HAVE AN IMPACT

 - Own onboarding and pre-boarding end-to-end by ensuring all logistics, systems, and manager plans are in place, tracking Day 1, Week 1, and 30/90-day milestones, and flagging risks early.

 - Run recruiting coordination at a high bar by scheduling interviews, managing candidate experience, and partnering with the Head of People and hiring managers to ensure speed, organization, and strong communication throughout the process.

 - Drive offboarding execution by managing separation workflows, documentation, and cross-functional coordination with IT, Finance, and managers.

 - Operate and improve People systems by maintaining data accuracy across tools (Gusto, Windmill, etc.), supporting payroll and benefits, and identifying opportunities to streamline workflows.

 - Manage the SF office and employee experience by overseeing office operations, vendors, events, and ensuring a high-quality in-office and remote experience.

 - Support People analytics and reporting by maintaining dashboards (headcount, attrition, onboarding progress), tracking operational metrics, and contributing to monthly People recaps.

 - Lead end-to-end planning of team and company off-sites and created meaningful employee experiences through recognition programs, key milestones, and surprise & delight initiatives


WHAT YOU WILL BRING

 - You know how to effectively prioritize, but are also adaptable and flexible- you are excited to work in an environment that is constantly evolving.

 - You like to move quickly and are constantly looking for ways to automate processes and tasks.

 - You are an excellent communicator, regardless of channel (written & verbal) or group (internal or external).

 - 4+ years of experience in a fast-paced, people-facing role, preferably within a high-growth or startup environment.


NICE TO HAVES

 - Experience in high-growth startup environments

 - Familiarity with tools like Ashby, Notion, Gusto, or similar

 - Experience supporting recruiting coordination or candidate experience

 - Exposure to People analytics or reporting


WHAT WE WILL BRING

 - Competitive salary and equity in a high-growth company

 - Opportunity to make an immediate impact

 - Medical, dental,

notes: AI scribe company with rapid growth and VC backing
